target.title: [AI] fix(agents): recover from non-resumable assistant tail by re-presenting last user message
target.body:
## Summary

Gateway restart recovery for non-resumable text-only assistant tails now re-presents the last user transcript message with an idempotency guard when pending tool calls are detected, instead of forcing a user retype.

- Problem: After gateway restart, sessions with text-only assistant-tail interruptions (no tool calls, no approval pending) failed silently, forcing users to retype even though the original request was preserved in the transcript.
- Solution: Detect inspectable text-only assistant tails, extract the last user message from the transcript, and re-present it to the agent wrapped in `wrapUntrustedPromptDataBlock`. Recovery functions handle both raw API and OpenClaw canonical content-block formats.
- What changed: `src/agents/main-session-restart-recovery.ts` — `hasAssistantToolCalls()` with 6 canonical block types, `findLastUserMessage()` with content-block array support via `collectTextContentBlocks()`, `resolveMainSessionResumeBlockReason()` returning meaningful tail, `buildResumeMessage()` idempotency guard + untrusted wrapper, 200-message / 1 MB fallback window, `hasInspectableContent()` guard for oversized/empty assistant tails
- What did NOT change: Tool-call tails and approval-pending tails remain fail-closed (ask user to retype). Resumable tail paths (user/tool/toolResult). Session detection for auto-resume.

## Scope (this PR)

This is a **text-only assistant-tail recovery** change. Assistant tails with pending tool calls or stale approvals still fail and prompt the user to retype. The broader no-retype recovery policy for side-effecting tails is tracked in #95609.

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix
- [x] Feature

## Scope

- [x] Gateway / orchestration

## Linked Issue/PR

- Related to #95609 (broader no-retype umbrella — this PR covers text-only tails)

## Real behavior proof

51 unit tests pass covering the full recovery pipeline: tool-call detection (6 canonical formats), user message extraction (string + content-block arrays), meaningful tail detection, 200-message fallback, idempotency guard, and text-only fail-closed scope.

```console
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/main-session-restart-recovery.test.ts --run
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  51 passed (51)
```

## Security Impact

- [x] New permissions/capabilities? No
- [x] Secrets/tokens handling changed? No
- [x] New/changed network calls? No
- [x] Command/tool execution surface changed? No
- [x] Data access scope changed? No

## AI Assistance

- **AI-assisted**: Yes
- **AI model**: deepseek-v4-pro
- **Human confirmed understanding of code changes**: Yes

---
Related to #95609
target.author: xydt-tanshanshan
